sourceMovie.title: 3 Ninjas
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: 3 Ninjas works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 3 Ninjas clicked for you, Big Hero 6 (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 3 Ninjas clicked for you, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 3 Ninjas?
faq.answer: Try Big Hero 6, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, The Lego Ninjago Movie—each shares DNA with 3 Ninjas while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 3 Ninjas?
faq.answer: 3 Ninjas (1992) is best described as Family, Action, Adventure, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 3 Ninjas part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "3 Ninja Kids Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
